name: narrative-designer
description: Seamlessly blending narrative and gameplay, making story and interaction inseparable

displayDescription.en: Seamlessly blending narrative and gameplay, making story and interaction inseparable
displayDescription.zh: 将叙事和游戏玩法无缝融合，让故事与互动不可分割

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们的游戏需要引人入胜的剧情和对话,请叙事设计师帮我们编写游戏剧情。
defaultInitPrompt.en: Our game needs compelling storylines and dialogue. Please, Narrative Designer, help us write game stories.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们的游戏需要引人入胜的剧情和对话,请叙事设计师帮我们编写游戏剧情。
quickPrompts.en: Our game needs compelling storylines and dialogue. Please, Narrative Designer, help us write game stories.

quickPrompts.zh: 撰写角色背景和剧情分支
quickPrompts.en: Write character backstories and story branches

quickPrompts.zh: 制定叙事节奏和情感体验方案
quickPrompts.en: Develop narrative pacing and emotional experience plan
